notes: Section 1961a, , , ; , §§ 1–3, , , related to water resources research institutes. See .Pub. L. 88–379, title I, § 10078 Stat. 329Pub. L. 92–17585 Stat. 493section 7811 of this titleJuly 17, 1964Dec. 2, 1971

Section 1961a–1, , , , authorized appropriations for specific water resources research projects, including regional projects. See sections 7815(a) and 7872 of this title.Pub. L. 88–379, title I, § 10178 Stat. 330July 17, 1964

Section 1961a–2, , , ; , , , set time and amount of payments to institutes, directed that an accounting officer be appointed to each State institute and submit an annual report to Secretary of the Interior, and required that State replace diminished, lost or misapplied funds. See .Pub. L. 88–379, title I, § 10278 Stat. 330Pub. L. 92–175, § 485 Stat. 493section 7876 of this titleJuly 17, 1964Dec. 2, 1971

Section 1961a–3, , , , made appropriated funds available for printing and publishing results of research and for the planning, coordinating and conducting of cooperative research. See .Pub. L. 88–379, title I, § 10378 Stat. 330section 7812 of this titleJuly 17, 1964

Section 1961a–4, , , ; , , , related to powers and duties of Secretary of the Interior. See .Pub. L. 88–379, title I, § 10478 Stat. 331Pub. L. 89–404, § 280 Stat. 130section 7813 of this titleJuly 17, 1964Apr. 19, 1966

Section 1961a–5, , , , related to legal relationship of educational institutions and State governments and Federal control or direction of education. See .Pub. L. 88–379, title I, § 10578 Stat. 331section 7814 of this titleJuly 17, 1964
